papers.title_en: Supervised vs. unsupervised radiomics reproducibility across dose-level variations and partial volume correction methods in total-body PET imaging
papers.tldr: 本研究针对全身[18F]-FDG PET成像，系统性地评估了影像组学特征的可重复性。研究重点探讨了放射性剂量变化、部分体积校正（PVC）以及数据协调化处理对特征稳定性的影响，通过对比监督与非监督分析方法，旨在为临床PET影像组学研究提供更稳健的特征选择标准和处理流程。
papers.abstract_en: Background and objective: To provide a systematic reproducibility analysis ofradiomic features in total-body [18 F]-FDG PET imaging, assessing the effects ofdose variation, partial volume correction (PVC), and harmonization. Methods: A dual …

papers.title_en: GiTNet: A graph-based trajectory-informed network for gaze-supervised medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: Creating fully annotated labels for medical image segmentation is both time-consuming and costly, underscoring the need for efficient annotation schemes toalleviate the workload. Eye tracking offers an economical solution that can be …。
papers.abstract_en: Creating fully annotated labels for medical image segmentation is both time-consuming and costly, underscoring the need for efficient annotation schemes toalleviate the workload. Eye tracking offers an economical solution that can be …

papers.title_en: QPath: A Question-Aware Multi-Resolution Vision Language Framework for Computational Pathology
papers.tldr: 本研究针对计算病理学中视觉问答（VQA）任务，提出了QPath框架。针对现有模型仅依赖单分辨率分析而忽略病理切片多尺度特性的局限性，QPath引入了问题感知的多分辨率视觉语言处理机制。该框架能够根据问题需求动态整合不同尺度的病理图像特征，显著提升了模型在复杂病理诊断任务中的表现，为多模态大模型在病理学领域的应用提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Computational pathology has recently advanced through the use of multimodal largelanguage models (MLLMs) for visual question answering (VQA). However, mostexisting approaches rely on single-resolution analysis of pathology images, limiting …

papers.title_en: SVCF: Enabling Zero-Shot Correction of Reasoning Steps in Multi-Modal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: The latest advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) havedemonstrated remarkable performance in complex reasoning tasks. However, withthe increasing complexity of problems and the diversification of modalities, MLLMs …。
papers.abstract_en: The latest advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) havedemonstrated remarkable performance in complex reasoning tasks. However, withthe increasing complexity of problems and the diversification of modalities, MLLMs …

papers.title_en: Game-Theoretic Insights into Multi-Agent LLM Debate for Enhanced Clinical Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在临床问答中可靠性不足的问题，引入博弈论视角探讨多智能体辩论（MAD）机制。通过让多个LLM智能体相互评价并整合答案，研究深入分析了辩论过程中的交互动态。该方法不仅显著提升了模型在复杂医学问题上的回答准确性，还为理解多智能体协作提供了理论支撑，是增强临床决策支持系统可靠性的重要贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) have advanced in medical question answering, yetensuring reliability remains challenging. We study multi-agent debate (MAD), wheremultiple LLM agents critique and aggregate each other's answers. Our game …

papers.title_en: A clinical-radiomics integrated nomogram for predicting 5-year survival in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease
papers.tldr: 本研究针对类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病（RA-ILD）预后评估难的问题，旨在开发一种预测患者5年生存率的工具。研究人员通过整合患者的临床特征与CT影像组学特征，构建了一个综合列线图模型。结果表明，该模型能有效预测RA-ILD患者的长期生存情况，为临床医生进行风险分层和制定个体化治疗方案提供了科学依据，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease (RA-ILD)shortens survival and impairs quality of life, with prognosis assessment challenging.This study aimed to predict RA-ILD patients' survival via clinical features and …

papers.title_en: Deep learning-based Wilms tumor segmentation to create 3D models for surgical planning: Implementation in the clinical workflow
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在利用深度学习技术自动分割肾母细胞瘤（Wilms tumor）的术前MRI影像，以生成用于手术规划的3D模型。针对传统手动分割耗时费力的问题，研究团队开发了深度学习算法并将其集成到临床工作流中，实现了高效、准确的肿瘤自动分割，为外科医生提供了更直观的术前参考，显著提升了临床效率。
papers.abstract_en: Background and aim Creating 3D models based on pre-operative MRI of patientswith a Wilms tumor (WT) can aid surgical planning. However, creating these modelsrequires manual delineation (segmentation) of the MRI imaging. Deep learning can …

papers.title_en: Saliency-R1: Enforcing Interpretable and Faithful Vision-language Reasoning via Saliency-map Alignment Reward
papers.tldr: 针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在推理过程中过度依赖文本线索而忽视视觉证据的问题，本文提出了 Saliency-R1。该方法通过引入显著性图对齐奖励（Saliency-map Alignment Reward），在强化学习框架下强制模型的推理逻辑与视觉关注区域保持一致。研究贡献在于通过这种对齐机制显著提升了模型的可解释性和忠实度，有效减少了模型在多模态任务中的虚假推理现象。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success across diversetasks. However, concerns about their trustworthiness persist, particularly regardingtendencies to lean more on textual cues than visual evidence and the risk of …

papers.title_en: Memory Dial: A Training Framework for Controllable Memorization in Language Models
papers.tldr: 语言模型中的记忆现象难以隔离和控制，现有方法多为事后检测。本文提出了 Memory Dial 训练框架，旨在实现对语言模型记忆行为的主动控制。该框架通过在训练过程中引入可控机制，使研究者能够精确调节模型对特定数据的记忆程度。这一方法为理解模型预测机制提供了新视角，并为解决隐私保护和版权问题提供了潜在的技术手段。
papers.abstract_en: Memorization in language models is widely studied but remains difficult to isolateand control. Understanding when and what models memorize is essential forexplaining their predictions, yet existing approaches are post-hoc: they can detect …

papers.title_en: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
papers.tldr: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）作为自回归模型的替代方案，正逐渐扩展到多模态领域。然而，在视觉定位推理任务中，扩散模型仍面临挑战。本文提出了“Thinking Diffusion”框架，通过惩罚错误推理路径并引导模型关注关键视觉特征，增强了扩散多模态大模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的表现。该方法在多个基准测试中展现了优于传统自回归模型和现有扩散模型的性能，为多模态推理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives toautoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodaltasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models …

papers.title_en: The Illusion of Superposition? A Principled Analysis of Latent Thinking in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本文对语言模型中的潜在推理（Latent CoT）进行了深入分析，探讨了其在连续空间中运行是否真的利用了“叠加态”来增强表达能力。研究通过原则性分析挑战了关于叠加态的普遍假设，揭示了连续链式思考性能提升的内在机制。该工作为理解大模型如何处理复杂推理任务提供了新的理论视角，并对未来潜在推理架构的设计具有重要指导意义。
papers.abstract_en: Latent reasoning via continuous chain-of-thoughts (Latent CoT) has emerged as apromising alternative to discrete CoT reasoning. Operating in continuous spaceincreases expressivity and has been hypothesized to enable superposition: the …

papers.title_en: LoSA: Locality Aware Sparse Attention for Block-Wise Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对块状扩散语言模型（DLM）在处理长上下文时面临的内存瓶颈问题，提出了 LoSA（局部感知稀疏注意力）。LoSA 通过结合扩散生成过程中的局部性特征，优化了注意力机制的计算效率。该方法在显著降低内存开销和计算复杂度的同时，保持了高质量的多 Token 并行生成能力，为高效非自回归文本生成提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Block-wise diffusion language models (DLMs) generate multiple tokens in any order,offering a promising alternative to the autoregressive decoding pipeline. However,they still remain bottlenecked by memory-bound attention in long-context scenarios …

papers.title_en: Does RL Expand the Capability Boundary of LLM Agents? A PASS@(k, T) Analysis
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了强化学习（RL）究竟是扩展了LLM智能体的能力边界，还是仅提升了其可靠性。通过引入PASS@(k, T)分析框架，作者对比了基础模型与RL模型在不同尝试次数和时间步下的表现。研究发现，虽然在静态推理中两者在大量尝试后性能趋同，但在复杂的智能体交互场景下，RL能显著提升模型解决难题的上限，为理解RL在智能体开发中的作用提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: Does reinforcement learning genuinely expand what LLM agents can do, or merelymake them more reliable? For static reasoning, recent work answers the second:base and RL pass@ k curves converge at large k. We ask whether this holds for …

papers.title_en: SSL-R1: Self-Supervised Visual Reinforcement Post-Training for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在推理能力提升中过度依赖语言先验和昂贵人工标注的问题，提出了SSL-R1。这是一种自监督视觉强化学习后训练方法，通过引入可验证的视觉奖励机制，在无需大规模人工标注的情况下，显著增强了模型在视觉推理任务中的表现，为构建更具自主学习能力的MLLM提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated thegreat potential of enhancing the reasoning abilities in multimodal large languagemodels (MLLMs). However, the reliance on language-centric priors and expensive …
